name: Deep Orchestra
description: Planner, parallel workers, reviewer, judge, pause/resume, retry loop, and final synthesis. Use for deeper research, code review, or multi-step analysis.

nodes.title: Plan
nodes.prompt: Turn the user request into a compact plan with a summary, a confidence score, and concrete work_items for the workers. Return JSON.

nodes.title: Workers
nodes.prompt: Investigate the assigned work item. Return concise findings, evidence, risks, and open questions.

nodes.title: Review
nodes.prompt: Review the plan and worker reports. Decide whether the evidence is sufficient, identify gaps, and return JSON.

nodes.title: Judge
nodes.prompt: Choose the next route. Use done when the final answer is ready, retry when another worker pass is useful, and needs_user when user input is required. Return JSON.

nodes.title: Ask User
nodes.prompt: Ask the user for the missing detail, approval, or direction before continuing.

nodes.title: Answer
nodes.prompt: Synthesize the final user-facing response from the plan, reports, review, decision, and any resume feedback.
